case_title: RAMANLAL PATEL VS. DAVID G. MENDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY PATEL, RAMANLAL AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, DAVID G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-03-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, DAVID G.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DAVID G. MENDEZ IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-03-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMANLAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, DAVID G. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDEZ, DAVID G. HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDEZ, DAVID G. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT & [PROPOSED ORDER] RECEIVED & FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMANLAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2011 ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT WITH OPPOSITION. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT WAS GRANTED AND TRIAL COMMENCED, MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2011 BY JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT RETAIN.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMANLAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MENDEZ, DAVID G. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
